fields.name: urlpath
fields.label: URL Path
fields.description: Catalog category urlPath (e.g. apparel). Required for DA preview and enrichment. Live category URLs override this value.

fields.name: defaultCateId
fields.label: Default Category ID
fields.description: Optional: category ID for template preview in DA/UE when urlpath is not set (e.g. 2 for Apparel)
